mapper.select:
SELECT h.EMP_CODE AS empCode, h.EMP_NAME AS empName, h.DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, d.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, ISNULL(s.SHIFT_CODE, '') AS workPlanCode, ISNULL(s.SHIFT_NAME, '미설정') AS workPlanName, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, 'WORK') AS workDayType, r.REQ_ID AS requestId, CASE WHEN r.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' THEN o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE ELSE r.REQ_TYPE END AS requestWorkCode, r.REASON AS reason, r.REASON_DETAIL AS reasonDetail, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, r.STATUS AS status, r.REQUESTER_EMP_CODE AS requesterCode, re.EMP_NAME AS requesterName FROM HRIMASTER01 h LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 d ON h.COMPANY = d.COMPANY AND h.DEPT_CODE = d.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON d.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND d.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pm.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON pd.COMPANY = s.COMPANY AND pd.SHIFT_CODE = s.SHIFT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r ON h.COMPANY = r.COMPANY AND h.EMP_CODE = r.TARGET_EMP_CODE AND r.TARGET_DATE = CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)
AND r.REQ_GROUP = 'GENERAL'
AND r.REQ_TYPE IN ('연장', '조출연장')
AND r.REQ_TYPE = '휴일근무'
AND r.REQ_TYPE IN ('조퇴', '외근', '외출', '전반차', '후반차')
AND r.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER'
LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRIMASTER01 re ON r.COMPANY = re.COMPANY AND r.REQUESTER_EMP_CODE = re.EMP_CODE WHERE h.COMPANY = #{company} AND h.DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode} AND h.RETIRE_DATE IS NULL
AND h.EMP_CODE = #{loginEmpCode}
AND s.WORK_DAY_TYPE IN ('OFF', 'HOLIDAY')
AND (s.WORK_DAY_TYPE IS NULL OR s.WORK_DAY_TYPE NOT IN ('OFF', 'HOLIDAY'))
AND h.EMP_CODE = #{empCode}
AND s.SHIFT_CODE = #{workPlanFilter}
ORDER BY h.EMP_CODE

SELECT r.COMPANY AS company, r.REQ_ID AS requestId, r.TARGET_EMP_CODE AS empCode, r.TARGET_DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), r.TARGET_DATE, 23) AS workDate, r.REQ_GROUP AS requestCategory, CASE WHEN r.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' THEN o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE ELSE r.REQ_TYPE END AS requestWorkCode, r.REASON AS reason, r.REASON_DETAIL AS reasonDetail, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, r.STATUS AS status, r.REQUESTER_EMP_CODE AS requesterCode FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID WHERE r.REQ_ID = #{requestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 ( COMPANY, REQ_ID, REQ_GROUP, REQ_TYPE, REQUESTER_EMP_CODE, TARGET_EMP_CODE, REQUESTER_DEPT_CODE, TARGET_DEPT_CODE, TARGET_DATE, REASON, REASON_DETAIL, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{requestId}, CASE WHEN #{requestCategory} = 'OTHER' THEN 'OTHER' ELSE 'GENERAL' END, CASE WHEN #{requestCategory} = 'OTHER' THEN 'SHIFT_CHANGE' ELSE #{requestWorkCode} END, #{requesterCode}, #{empCode}, #{requesterDeptCode}, #{deptCode}, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), #{reason}, #{reasonDetail}, #{status}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )

INSERT INTO HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 ( COMPANY, REQ_ID, START_TIME, END_TIME, WORK_MIN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{requestId}, CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME), ABS(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME))), GETDATE(), GETDATE() )

INSERT INTO HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 ( COMPANY, REQ_ID, CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{requestId}, #{requestWorkCode}, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 SET REQ_TYPE = CASE WHEN REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' THEN 'SHIFT_CHANGE' ELSE #{requestWorkCode} END, REASON = #{reason}, REASON_DETAIL = #{reasonDetail}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND COMPANY = #{company}

UPDATE HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 SET START_TIME = CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), END_TIME = CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME), WORK_MIN = ABS(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME))), UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND COMPANY = #{company}
UPDATE HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId}
mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DEPT_CODE
SELECT SHIFT_CODE AS shiftCode, SHIFT_NAME AS shiftName, WORK_DAY_TYPE AS workDayType FROM HRTSHIFTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_SEQ, SHIFT_CODE
